name: Pawn Shop Manhattan
description_short: Manhattan-based precious metals and luxury goods buyer offering cash for gold, diamonds, watches, coins, and antiques. Located in the Diamond District on 47th Street.
description_long:
Royal Gems Corp operates as a cash-for-gold and luxury goods buyer in Manhattan's Diamond District, positioning itself as a specialized alternative to traditional pawn shops. The business focuses exclusively on high-value items rather than general collateral lending, primarily serving customers who want to liquidate jewelry, watches, coins, and antiques for immediate cash.

The company buys gold, silver, platinum, diamonds, gemstones, luxury watches (Rolex, Patek Philippe, Tag Heuer, Bulgari), coins (American, silver, and international), antiques, and related precious metal items. They emphasize same-day cash payment and claim to provide "best prices" and "premium prices" for items regardless of condition. The business operates on a walk-in basis in Manhattan, with phone quotes available at (212) 575-1943.

Royal Gems Corp differentiates itself through claimed expertise in luxury watch valuation, certification as diamond buyers, and stated commitment to confidentiality. They market themselves as a "trusted buyer" with years of business history in Manhattan, positioning the Diamond District location as a credential for expertise in precious metals and gemstones.

However, the website lacks critical information typical of legitimate precious metals buyers: no pricing methodology, no weight-based rates, no buyback guarantees, no independent certifications displayed, no business hours, and no physical address beyond "47th Street." The repetitive website content and generic marketing language raise questions about transparency. Customers should independently verify their credentials and compare offers elsewhere before selling high-value items, as precious metals pricing varies significantly and depends on current market rates.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Same-day cash payment claimed for all categories of items
Accepts items in any condition (broken chains, damaged coins, worn watches)
Specializes in luxury watch brands with claimed expert valuation
Buys diverse precious metal categories (gold, silver, platinum) in one location
Located in Manhattan's Diamond District, establishing local credibility
Phone quote option available before visiting in person
cons: Website provides no pricing methodology, rates, or how offers are calculated
No independent certifications, gemological credentials, or third-party verification displayed
Repetitive website content suggests outdated or low-effort web presence
No posted business hours, making visit planning difficult
No information about buyback policies, return windows, or customer recourse
Generic marketing claims without specific business history details or owner credentials
best_for: Individuals with loose diamonds, gemstones, or high-end watches needing quick liquidity
Estate sellers looking to liquidate inherited jewelry and antiques for cash
Coin and precious metals collectors seeking to sell accumulated inventories locally
diagnosis: Best for Manhattan residents or visitors with high-value jewelry, watches, or precious metals to liquidate quickly for cash. Main caveat: lacking transparency on pricing, certifications, and buyback policies—customers should compare multiple buyers and verify credentials before selling valuable items, as precious metals markets fluctuate and offers vary significantly between buyers.
services: Buy gold at claimed best prices
Buy luxury watches (Rolex, Patek Philippe, Tag Heuer, Bulgari)
Buy diamonds and gemstones (certified diamond buyers)
Buy antique toys and other antiques
Same-day cash payment for sold items
In-person evaluations and offers at Manhattan location
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: AA, 10 West End Ave APT#28, New York, NY 10023
